source_jobs.title: Video Editor - Snowball
source_jobs.description:
VIDEO EDITOR — SNOWBALL

Full-Time | $80,000–$100,000/year | US Remote



We're building the best YouTube agency in the world.



We've assembled a crazy-talented group of YouTube strategists who've collectively generated over 110 billion views and shaped how YouTube works today. Our founder, Ryan Hashemi, built Jubilee to 14 million subscribers, has 4 Emmy nominations, and even trained the person who now is the CEO of MrBeast's studio. Our team comes from iconic names like WIRED, Vogue, Mini Katana (18M+ subs), and other influential YouTube brands.

(Learn more about Ryan’s journey here: https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7262864813221888000/ )

Now we're helping the world's biggest brands crack the code on YouTube and make content that people actually want to watch at scale.

We lead YouTube creative and content programming as a strategic channel. We staff and train in-house YouTube teams for clients, hiring video producers, editors, and strategists, and build long-form storytelling systems designed to compound over time. The result: evergreen content that earns millions of views, builds loyal audiences, and drives conversions.




WHY THIS IS EXCITING

After stepping down from Jubilee, Ryan is betting everything on Snowball, and that bet is already paying off.

The world’s biggest brands know YouTube is the next frontier, they just need the right partner to help them win.

That’s where you come in.




YOUR ROLE: VIDEO EDITOR

As a founding Video Editor at Snowball, you will play a key role in shaping YouTube content for some of the biggest brands in the world.. You’ll be crafting stories designed to hold attention, drive retention, and help channels scale through repeatable, high-performing formats.

You’ll work closely with our world-class producers, strategists, and channel leads to bring ideas to life, refine pacing, and elevate the creative standard across every video. This role is ideal for an editor who understands that editing is storytelling and who is excited to push beyond technical execution into creative problem solving.

You’ll be part of a team that treats YouTube as a strategic channel, building long-form content systems designed to grow audiences and deliver measurable results over time.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Edit high-performing long-form YouTube content for our clients across established and emerging channels

 - Assemble rough cuts and refine them into polished, final edits

 - Execute pacing decisions that prioritize clarity, retention, and storytelling

 - Collaborate with producers and strategists to interpret creative briefs and bring concepts to life

 - Implement notes quickly and accurately across multiple feedback rounds

 - Manage multiple projects and clients at once while meeting deadlines

 - Maintain consistency across episodes, formats, and recurring content series

 - Ensure assets, timelines, and exports follow consistent internal standards

 - Support the development of repeatable editing systems that enable channel scale

 - Streamline editing processes and workflows to ensure projects stay on track and deadlines are met




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 3–5+ years of professional editing experience with a strong portfolio demonstrating storytelling craft (required). YouTube experience preferred.

 - Deep proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, or comparable editing software.

 - Strong understanding of YouTube pacing, structure, retention tactics, and platform best practices.

 - Experience editing educational, narrative, branded, or documentary-style content.

 - Experience editing long-form content (YouTube experience strongly preferred)

 - Understanding of pacing, retention, and storytelling structure

 - Comfort working in fast-paced environments with competing client priorities and tight timelines

 - Collaborative mindset and ability to communicate clearly with producers and teams

 - Strong attention to detail and file organization skills

 - Ability t

source_jobs.title: Producer/Director — Kajabi
source_jobs.description:
PRODUCER/DIRECTOR — KAJABI

3 month contract | LA/SD/OC, CA (Hybrid)



Snowball is seeking a Producer/Director to help lead YouTube content for Kajabi, the platform empowering creators, coaches, educators, and entrepreneurs to build thriving online businesses.




ABOUT KAJABI

Founded in 2010 and rebuilt from the ground up, Kajabi is in the middle of a once-in-a-decade transformation. With their founders back at the helm, they're moving fast, raising the bar, and rewriting what the expert economy can look like. This isn't a corporate SaaS company playing it safe. It's a team of builders who believe the next decade belongs to real experts, people with earned wisdom, real experience, and something worth teaching.

Tens of thousands of people around the world use Kajabi to turn their knowledge into income, impact, and independence. Their users, called Heroes, aren't customers. They're everyday entrepreneurs building freedom for themselves and changing lives because of it.

In a world flooded with AI-generated noise, Kajabi exists to give experts leverage. A platform that amplifies their humanity, protects their credibility, and makes real expertise worth more.




THE OPPORTUNITY

Kajabi is expanding its YouTube presence. As a Producer/Director, you'll develop YouTube-first formats that make the expert economy tangible and compelling, translating Kajabi's mission of creator independence into content that actually earns its views. From concept to publish, you'll own the full production process, ensuring content feels unmistakably Kajabi: bold, human, and built for builders.

This role reports directly to Kajabi, with Snowball serving as the creative YouTube partner supporting the channel's strategic and creative development. You'll collaborate closely with Snowball's YouTube growth experts (27M+ subs, 110B+ views) to push creative boundaries, experiment with new formats, and help build one of the most compelling voices in the creator economy.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Develop and execute YouTube-first video formats aligned with Kajabi’s mission, voice, and learning philosophy.

 - Develop concepts, episode outlines, interview structures, and production plans

 - Direct hosts, creators, customers, and guests to capture authentic, engaging performances

 - Partner closely with editors to shape story structure, pacing, and creative vision throughout post-production

 - Collaborate with strategists, marketers, and creative teams to produce videos aligned with channel goals

 - Manage production schedules, crews, vendors, locations, and shoot-day logistics

 - Continuously refine creative formats based on YouTube performance, audience insights, and best practices

 - Maintain a high creative bar while balancing efficiency, organization, and scalability

 - Partner with Snowball to analyze YouTube performance data and continuously optimize for reach, retention, and engagement.


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - 5+ years of experience producing and directing YouTube or digital-first content

 - Strong portfolio demonstrating exceptional storytelling and creative leadership

 - Experience leading productions from concept through final delivery

 - Excellent interviewing and directing skills, with the ability to make on-camera talent feel natural and confident

 - Strong project management and organizational skills with experience managing multiple productions simultaneously

 - Collaborative mindset and experience working cross-functionally with creative, production, and marketing teams

 - Confidence providing creative feedback throughout production and post-production

 - Passion for AI that actually helps people. Whether it's building smarter workflows, finding creative solutions, or making your team's day a little easier, we want to know how you're using AI to make a real impact, not just checking a box.


BONUS

 - Experience producing educational, creator, entrepreneurship, or business-focused content

 - Experience working with SaaS, technolog

source_jobs.title: Head of Sales
source_jobs.description:
WE'RE BUILDING THE BEST YOUTUBE AGENCY IN THE WORLD.



We've assembled a crazy-talented group of YouTube strategists who've collectively generated over 110 billion views and shaped how YouTube works today. Our founder, Ryan Hashemi, built Jubilee to 14 million subscribers, has 4 Emmy nominations, and even trained the person who now is the CEO of MrBeast's studio. Our team comes from iconic names like WIRED, Vogue, Mini Katana (18M+ subs), and other influential YouTube brands.



(Learn more about Ryan’s journey here: https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7262864813221888000/ )



Now we're helping the world's biggest brands crack the code on YouTube and make content that people actually want to watch at scale.



We lead YouTube creative and content programming as a strategic channel. We staff and train in-house YouTube teams for clients, hiring video producers, editors, and strategists, and build long-form storytelling systems designed to compound over time. The result: evergreen content that earns millions of views, builds loyal audiences, and drives conversions.

The Results
We launched a global tech-security company’s YouTube channel https://www.youtube.com/protonprivacy from scratch. In 30 days, 0 to 30,000 subscribers. 9 months in: 115k+ subscribers, 4.3 million organic views. Individual videos hit 1.2M, 1.5M, and 507K views. Zero paid amplification.



We Transformed a niche B2B brand into a breakout work-culture channel. Grew the channel to over 8k subs, generating 3.2 million organic views. Flagship video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JCvs5_TJSXM: 2.3M views. Proof that B2B can thrive with the right storytelling.



We're rebuilding how brands think about owned media. We hire creatives, run behavioral research, and build repeatable systems that outperform paid media on cost and attention. In a world where organic reach is collapsing everywhere else, we've proven brands can win if they treat YouTube as an owned channel, not an ad buy.




WHY THIS IS EXCITING

After stepping down from Jubilee, Ryan is betting everything on Snowball. That bet is already paying off in a big way. Major brands are coming to us because they know YouTube is the next frontier, they just need the right team to help them conquer it.



In just the last month, 30+ of the world’s biggest brands have hit our inbox asking for help. The inbound demand is real, and we can’t keep up. We’re looking for our founding sales leader, someone ready to turn this wave of demand into long-term, scalable growth.



That’s where you come in.




YOUR ROLE: HEAD OF SALES

We're growing fast, and we need someone who can:

 - Build out our sales function and team. Identify and prioritize high-potential brands who would thrive on YouTube, and pitch them with confidence and clarity.

 - Own the full sales cycle from outreach to close, bringing in new business and hitting revenue targets.

 - Manage and mentor a team to support top-of-funnel pipeline generation.

 - Learn and live Snowball's unique approach to YouTube, and clearly communicate that value to prospects.

 - Build genuine relationships with potential clients, deeply understanding their goals and how Snowball can drive growth.

 - Collaborate closely with our leadership and strategy teams to shape winning proposals and close deals.
   




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - You have 10+ years of experience in sales, business development, or GTM roles, and have owned the full sales cycle from outreach to close.

 - You're a persuasive closer with strong outbound instincts and a proactive, hustle-driven mindset.

 - You've built out a sales function and team.

 - You're a strategic thinker who can see the big picture, and sell it.

 - You have a deep passion for YouTube, digital content, and the future of media.

 - Bonus: Skills in Figma, Photoshop, or design tools.
   




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Strong base/commission split (OTE $400-600k+)

 - Health & vision benefits

 - 401(k)

 - Remote-Hybrid flex

source_jobs.title: YouTube Video Editor – Confidential Enterprise Tech Client
source_jobs.description:
YOUTUBE VIDEO EDITOR – CONFIDENTIAL ENTERPRISE TECH CLIENT

Full-time | $85k - $110k annual salary | Seattle, WA | Hybrid | Relocation opportunity for candidates open to relocating to Seattle

 

Snowball is hiring a YouTube Video Editor for a confidential, global technology company shaping how the world works, builds, and connects.

 


THE OPPORTUNITY

This is an opportunity to help evolve and scale established YouTube channels for one of the most influential technology brands in the world.

 

You’ll be editing content for high-visibility channels with built-in audiences, helping raise creative quality, improve retention, and bring powerful technology stories to life in a way that feels human, inspiring, and culturally relevant.

 

This role reports directly into the client’s internal marketing and content organization, with Snowball serving as the creative YouTube partner supporting the channel’s strategic and creative development. You’ll collaborate closely with Snowball’s YouTube growth experts (27M+ subscribers, 110B+ views) to elevate storytelling, refine creative execution, experiment with new formats, and help scale one of the most influential technology channels on the platform.

 


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Edit high-performing longform, YouTube-first content across established channels

 - Shape stories with strong pacing, hooks, and creative polish optimized for retention and watch time

 - Collaborate with internal marketing teams,producers, strategists, and creatives on various types of longform formats

 - Maintain organized, scalable workflows to ensure fast, reliable delivery at volume

 - Continuously refine creative based on performance data and audience insights


WHAT YOU BRING

 - 3–5 years of professional editing experience (YouTube experience strongly preferred)

 - Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and Frame.io http://Frame.io (After Effects is a plus)

 - Deep understanding of YouTube pacing, retention strategy, and storytelling conventions

 - Experience editing across multiple content types (educational, brand, campaign, product)

 - Strong attention to detail and comfort working in fast-moving production cycles

 - A collaborative mindset and passion for making complex topics accessible and engaging

source_jobs.title: YouTube Video Producer - Confidential Enterprise Tech Client
source_jobs.description:
YOUTUBE VIDEO PRODUCER – CONFIDENTIAL ENTERPRISE TECH CLIENT

Full-time | $120k–$160k annual salary | Seattle| Hybrid | Relocation opportunity for candidates open to relocating to Seattle

 

Snowball is hiring a YouTube Video Producer for a confidential, global technology company shaping how the world works, builds, and connects.

 


THE OPPORTUNITY

This is an opportunity to help evolve and scale YouTube channels for one of the most influential technology brands in the world. From concept to publish, you’ll own the full production process, with a focus on making powerful technology feel human, accessible, and exciting through YouTube-native storytelling.

 

This role reports directly into the client’s internal marketing and content organization, with Snowball serving as the creative YouTube partner supporting the channel’s strategic and creative development. You’ll collaborate closely with Snowball’s YouTube growth experts (27M+ subscribers, 110B+ views) to push creative boundaries, experiment with new formats.

 

The ideal candidate is a creative producer who understands how to operate at scale, thrives in high-output environments, and loves turning complex ideas into content people actually want to watch.

 


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Produce YouTube-first content across existing, high-performing channels

 - Lead end-to-end production: scripting, filming, producing, and post-production collaboration.

 - Evolve and elevate established formats while creating new, scalable series

 - Translate complex technical topics into clear, compelling, human-centered stories

 - Partner closely with internal marketing, brand, and product teams to ensure creative and strategic alignment

 - Use performance insights and audience data to optimize for reach, retention, and long-term growth

 - Help shape the long-term creative roadmap for the global brand’s YouTube presence



WHAT YOU BRING

 - 5+ years of video production, filmmaking, or content creation experience with a strong portfolio (YouTube experience preferred).

 - Experience producing content for established channels and scaling ongoing content programs

 - Proven ability to make technical or complex subjects engaging, accessible, and entertaining

 - Strong understanding of YouTube storytelling, packaging, pacing, and audience behavior

 - Strong organizational/project management skills and ability to manage multiple workflows.

 - A collaborative, proactive mindset and comfort working with large, cross-functional teams

source_jobs.title: YouTube Video Producer — Confidential Design-Tech Unicorn
source_jobs.description:
YOUTUBE VIDEO PRODUCER — CONFIDENTIAL DESIGN-TECH UNICORN

3 Month Contract to Start | 1.5-2K/Week | US Remote; NY Required



Snowball is seeking a YouTube Producer to support a leading design and technology platform shaping how teams build, collaborate, and bring ideas to life.




ABOUT OUR CLIENT

A leading design and technology company with over 13 million monthly users, on a mission to make design accessible to everyone. Their platform takes teams from early brainstorming all the way through to shipping.

They believe design is more than aesthetics. It's how a product works, feels, and comes together. High standards, genuine curiosity, and a deep commitment to the creative community define how they operate.




THE OPPORTUNITY

A ground-floor opportunity to produce premium YouTube content for a company at the center of modern design culture, in partnership with an award-winning Director and Snowball Agency.

This is a right-hand-to-the-director role. You’re pulling the piece together to ensure creative success; You'll scout locations, solve problems creatively on the fly, find efficiencies, and coordinate talent, crew, and vendors on set, all in service of making the best possible video. The director sets the vision. You make it real, on time and on budget.

The work goes beyond traditional brand content, exploring craft, creativity, and the evolving role of design in the world. If you care deeply about the final product and want to grow alongside a team that holds the bar high, this is the opportunity.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Lead end-to-end production of long-form, YouTube-first content from pre-production through final delivery

 - Scout locations, solve creative problems on the fly, and find efficiencies that serve the vision and the final product

 - Coordinate talent, crew, vendors, freelancers, and production partners to ensure seamless on-set execution

 - Manage budgets, scheduling, shoot logistics, and production calendars across multiple projects simultaneously

 - Partner cross-functionally with creative, marketing, product, and brand teams to keep deliverables and timelines aligned

 - Anticipate and resolve production challenges before they impact the shoot

 - Support editors and creative collaborators so assets, feedback, approvals, and deliverables move efficiently through the pipeline

 - Maintain clear communication across all stakeholders while keeping productions organized, on track, and within scope


WHAT YOU BRING

 - 5+ years of experience in production, line producing, production management, or digital content operations

 - Experience managing YouTube native or digital first productions with a strong understanding of production workflows and timelines

 - Exceptional organizational and communication skills, with the ability to manage multiple moving pieces simultaneously

 - Experience coordinating cross functional teams, external vendors, talent, and production crews

 - A systems oriented mindset, you think about how to build processes that scale efficiently over time

 - Ability to stay calm under pressure and problem solve quickly in fast moving production environments

 - Experience supporting the full production lifecycle, from early planning through post production delivery

 - A collaborative, low ego approach and genuine enjoyment of bringing structure and clarity to creative environments

 - Bonus: Experience working with SaaS, design tools, or technology brands; A deep love for design.


OUR VALUES

 - Work hard, learn harder

 - Be effectively proactive

 - Overdeliver for clients

 - Be kind by being clear

 - A+ players only




READY TO APPLY?

Resumes are great and all, but we'd love to see something creative that shows who you are and why you're excited about this role. We want to see the real you, what makes you unique, passionate, and ready to help us build the future of content marketing.

source_jobs.title: YouTube Video Editor — Kajabi
source_jobs.description:
YOUTUBE VIDEO EDITOR — KAJABI

Contract | US Remote



Snowball is seeking a YouTube Video Editor to help create engaging, high-quality content for Kajabi, the platform empowering creators, coaches, educators, and entrepreneurs to build thriving online businesses.




ABOUT KAJABI

Founded in 2010 and rebuilt from the ground up, Kajabi is in the middle of a once-in-a-decade transformation. With their founders back at the helm, they're moving fast, raising the bar, and rewriting what the expert economy can look like. This isn't a corporate SaaS company playing it safe. It's a team of builders who believe the next decade belongs to real experts, people with earned wisdom, real experience, and something worth teaching.

Tens of thousands of people around the world use Kajabi to turn their knowledge into income, impact, and independence. Their users, called Heroes, aren't customers. They're everyday entrepreneurs building freedom for themselves and changing lives because of it.

In a world flooded with AI-generated noise, Kajabi exists to give experts leverage. A platform that amplifies their humanity, protects their credibility, and makes real expertise worth more.




THE OPPORTUNITY

Kajabi is expanding its YouTube presence. As a YouTube Video Editor, you'll transform raw footage into engaging stories that educate, inspire, and keep audiences watching. You'll collaborate closely with producers, strategists, and creatives to create videos that balance strong storytelling with clear educational value.

This role supports Kajabi's growing YouTube presence, with Snowball serving as Kajabi's creative partner leading channel strategy, creative development, and growth. You'll work alongside Snowball's YouTube experts (27M+ subscribers, 110B+ views) to refine storytelling, experiment with new formats, and create content that helps entrepreneurs build better businesses while growing Kajabi's audience.

We're looking for someone with exceptional editing instincts, a strong understanding of YouTube storytelling, and the ability to shape educational content into videos that feel dynamic, polished, and highly engaging.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Edit YouTube-first, long-form content with strong pacing, structure, and audience retention

 - Shape compelling narratives from interviews, educational content, customer stories, and product-focused videos

 - Collaborate with producers and strategists to refine story structure, tone, and creative direction

 - Create engaging short-form cutdowns and social edits from long-form content

 - Incorporate motion graphics, text animation, music, and sound design to improve clarity and viewer engagement

 - Balance speed with quality while maintaining organized project files and efficient workflows

 - Iterate quickly based on creative feedback and YouTube performance insights


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - 3–5+ years of professional video editing experience with a strong YouTube portfolio

 - Expert proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and Frame.io http://Frame.io

 - Strong storytelling instincts with a deep understanding of pacing, retention, and audience engagement

 - Experience editing educational, creator, business, or brand content

 - Strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate closely with producers and creative teams

 - Highly organized with excellent attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously


BONUS

 - Experience with Adobe After Effects and motion graphics

 - Experience editing for SaaS, technology, or creator economy brands

 - Experience optimizing content for YouTube performance and audience retention

 - Familiarity with YouTube analytics and performance-driven editing


OUR VALUES

 - At Kajabi, customers are called Heroes. They're everyday entrepreneurs using the platform to turn their expertise into income, impact, and independence. Every value below is built around serving them.

 - t Kajabi, being Hero Obsessed means our Heroes' success is ou

source_jobs.title: YouTube Video Editor — Confidential Design-Tech Unicorn
source_jobs.description:
YOUTUBE VIDEO EDITOR — CONFIDENTIAL DESIGN-TECH UNICORN

Contract| 7-9K/Month | US Remote



Snowball is seeking a YouTube Editor to support a leading design and technology platform shaping how teams build, collaborate, and bring ideas to life.




ABOUT OUR CLIENT

A leading design and technology platform with a simple but ambitious mission: to make design more accessible to everyone. Their tools help teams bring ideas to life, from early brainstorming and prototyping to building and refining products in real time.

At their core, they believe design is more than how something looks. It’s how it works, how it feels, and how it comes together. Their work sits at the intersection of craft, creativity, and collaboration, helping teams think more clearly, move faster, and build better things together.

They care deeply about the creative community and are constantly evolving, with a culture grounded in curiosity, high standards, and learning from one another.




THE OPPORTUNITY

As a YouTube Video Editor, you’ll shape raw footage into clear, engaging stories that feel intentional, thoughtful, and easy to follow. You’ll collaborate closely with producers, strategists, and creatives to bring ideas to life in a way that balances craft, clarity, and creative expression.

This role supports Figma’s YouTube content efforts, with Snowball serving as the creative partner leading strategy, creative development, and channel growth. You’ll work closely with Snowball’s YouTube experts (27M+ subscribers, 110B+ views) to refine storytelling, explore new formats, and help build a channel rooted in quality, curiosity, and creative depth. You’ll shape narrative flow, simplify complex ideas, and create content that feels intentional and engages audiences from start to finish.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Edit YouTube first, long form content with strong pacing, structure, and narrative clarity

 - Shape stories that feel cohesive and engaging, with a clear throughline from start to finish

 - Collaborate with producers and strategists to refine story structure, tone, and creative intent

 - Create short form cutdowns and variations that extend the life of core content

 - Use motion, graphics, and sound design to enhance clarity and bring ideas to life

 - Maintain organized workflows that support consistency, quality, and reliable delivery


WHAT YOU BRING

 - 3–5+ years of professional video editing experience, with a strong portfolio of thoughtful, story driven work

 - Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and frame.io http://frame.io,

 - Strong storytelling instincts and an understanding of pacing, rhythm, and audience engagement

 - Experience editing educational, brand, or narrative driven content

 - A detail oriented and collaborative approach, with comfort working in fast moving creative environments

 - An interest in design, creativity, or tools that support how people build and express ideas

 - Bonus: Experience with Adobe AfterEffects and editing for technology, design, or SaaS brands


OUR VALUES

 - Work hard, learn harder

 - Be effectively proactive

 - Overdeliver for clients

 - Be kind by being clear

 - A+ players only


READY TO APPLY?

Resumes are great and all, but we'd love to see something creative that shows who you are and why you're excited about this role. We want to see the real you, what makes you unique, passionate, and ready to help us build the future of content marketing.

source_jobs.title: Creative Storyteller for Faith-Based Media
source_jobs.description:
CONTRACT | $2-9K/MONTH | US REMOTE

Snowball is seeking compassionate, faith-driven hosts to lead meaningful conversations for PrayerSong, a mission-driven platform focused on spreading love, hope, and human connection through music and storytelling.




ABOUT OUR CLIENT

PrayerSong creates powerful content designed to comfort, inspire, and bring people together. Their work centers on compassion, resilience, spiritual reflection, and universal human experiences that transcend background or belief.

A glimpse into PrayerSong: Real people share deeply meaningful stories from their lives, and the team transforms them into original songs that honor those experiences and become lifelong keepsakes. See here for an example of the impact.

Mission alignment is essential. The team is looking for someone whose Christian faith is central to who they are and who has personally experienced God changing their life. More than hosting or media experience, they're looking for someone who genuinely loves people, is moved by hearing people's stories, and wants to help others share how God has worked in their lives.




THE OPPORTUNITY

PrayerSong is looking for hosts to lead authentic conversations with individuals sharing stories of faith, hope, forgiveness, and transformation. Those stories become the foundation for an original PrayerSong, which is gifted to both the person sharing the story and someone they choose to receive it.

This is not a creator, influencer, or traditional content creation role. We're not looking for someone with a social following or professional media experience. Instead, we're looking for someone who naturally connects with people, creates a welcoming environment where others feel comfortable opening up, and represents PrayerSong's mission with warmth and authenticity.

Part of this role may also include helping identify individuals within your church, local community, or personal network who have meaningful stories they'd be willing to share on camera.

This role reports directly to PrayerSong, with Snowball serving as the strategic YouTube partner supporting channel growth and creative development. You will work alongside a team that has collectively grown YouTube channels to 27M+ subscribers and generated over 110B views.

If invited to move forward, you'll be asked to complete one trial assignment: interview someone in your community in a conversational, street-interview style similar to Meet Cutes NYC https://www.tiktok.com/@meetcutesnyc, Love Dial Show https://www.tiktok.com/@lovedialshow, or I Love You Movement https://www.tiktok.com/@ilymovement. The goal is to create a genuine, heartfelt conversation that reflects how you naturally connect with people. Compensation for the trial is a custom PrayerSong (valued at $200).

Selected hosts will have the opportunity to continue in the role at $2K–$9K per month, depending on availability and monthly video output.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Host on-camera conversations with individuals sharing personal stories of faith, hope, and transformation

 - Help uncover the heart of each story so it can be transformed into a meaningful PrayerSong for both the storyteller and the person receiving it

 - Help facilitate and capture the emotional moment as both the storyteller and their chosen recipient experience the PrayerSong together

 - Create a safe, welcoming environment where people feel comfortable sharing vulnerable experiences

 - Listen with empathy and ask thoughtful follow-up questions that help people tell their stories authentically

 - Represent PrayerSong's mission with warmth, compassion, and authenticity

 - Help identify and connect PrayerSong with individuals in your church, local community, or personal network who may be willing to share their stories on camera

 - Collaborate with the PrayerSong and Snowball teams throughout production

 - Manage your schedule and communicate proactively with the production team
   
   


WHAT YOU BRING

 - A strong Christia

The Results
We launched a global tech-security company’s YouTube channel https://www.youtube.com/protonprivacy from scratch. In 30 days, 0 to 30,000 subscribers. 9 months in: 115k+ subscribers, 4.3 million organic views. Individual videos hit 1.2M, 1.5M, and 507K views. Zero paid amplification.

We Transformed a niche B2B brand into a breakout work-culture channel. Grew the channel to over 8k subs, generating 3.2 million organic views. Flagship video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JCvs5_TJSXM: 2.3M views. Proof that B2B can thrive with the right storytelling.

We're rebuilding how brands think about owned media. We hire creatives, run behavioral research, and build repeatable systems that outperform paid media on cost and attention. In a world where organic reach is collapsing everywhere else, we've proven brands can win if they treat YouTube as an owned channel, not an ad buy.




WHY THIS IS EXCITING

After stepping down from Jubilee, Ryan is betting everything on Snowball, and that bet is already paying off.

The world’s biggest brands know YouTube is the next frontier, they just need the right partner to help them win.

That’s where you come in.




YOUR ROLE: GROUP ACCOUNT DIRECTOR

As a Group Account Director, you will lead a portfolio of key client relationships at Snowball, acting as a trusted partner across strategy, creative, and execution.

You will oversee multiple engagements end-to-end, leading both client relationships and internal teams. You are responsible for setting the tone, elevating the work, and ensuring everything we deliver meets the highest creative and strategic bar.

You know how to navigate complex organizations, build trust with senior stakeholders, and translate business goals into clear creative direction. You are just as comfortable in a client presentation as you are working side-by-side with producers and strategists to shape the work.

You will also play a key role in growing our partnerships, identifying opportunities to expand scope, deepen relationships, and drive long-term value for both Snowball and our clients.







WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Lead a portfolio of client accounts, owning relationships from day-to-day execution through long-term strategy

 - Act as a true client partner, building trust by deeply understanding each client’s business, brand, and internal challenges

 - Translate client goals into clear creative and strategic direction for internal teams

 - Lead and mentor cross-functional teams (producers, strategists, creatives), ensuring alignment and high-quality output

 - Drive the development of presentations, proposals, and strategic recommendations

 - Identify opportunities to grow accounts and expand Snowball’s impact within client organizations

 - Support clients beyond scope when needed, stepping in to help with briefs, internal storytelling, and decision-making

 - Champion great work inter

notes: Snowball is a YouTube agency with a mix of creative and sales roles.
